lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX loadout, hardpoint sizes and power/capacitor budget across four large mounts.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Python Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, hull/shield figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, the zero-military-slot internal layout and module-variant data behind the AX reinforcement plan.

sources.label: Inara — Python Mk II
sources.what: Ship overview: base stats, internals layout, hardpoints, price, and confirmation of no rank requirement.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Wiki
sources.what: Python Mk II hull profile, cross-referenced against AX weapon class limits (no huge AX gun; medium-class Gauss).
